label: Transparent horned lizard motif
workflow: Built-in image generation on flat #00ff00 chroma key, then local remove_chroma_key.py alpha extraction with border auto-key, soft matte, and despill.
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Horned Lizard transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only a horned lizard body motif for a design-system catalog, isolated as a single complete subject on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: A realistic desert horned lizard, complete body visible, low broad flattened body, short tail, crown of small horns, spiky fringe scales along sides, sand tan skin with rust markings and dark horn shadows, granular reptile texture, alert defensive posture with squat utility silhouette. Natural reptile anatomy, crisp subject edges, distinctive horned lizard silhouette, no extra animals.
Composition/framing: centered three-quarter top side-profile cutout with generous padding; full head, horns, body, legs, claws, and tail visible, not cropped. Clean studio lighting that preserves sand tan, rust, horn shadow, and desert neutral detail. No cast shadow.
Chroma-key background: perfectly flat solid #00ff00 background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no desert scene, no plants, no rocks, no props, no text, no watermark, no second subject, no cartoon, no floor plane, no shadow.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Horned Lizard light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Horned Lizard", derived from a desert wash horned lizard body motif: sand tan scales, rust dorsal markings, horn shadows, brown side spines, and a defensive utility system mood. This board is a source reference for implementing a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible field operations and safety dashboard UI.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 high-resolution board, clean professional UI design-system presentation, target 3840x2160 feel with large readable labels.
Required visible sections: Morphous Horned Lizard, Horned Lizard, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Sample Usage.
Reference use: Extract palette and interaction language from a horned lizard's flattened armored body, crown horns, side fringe scales, sand camouflage, rust dorsal patches, dark horn shadows, and desert wash grit. The board must read as horned lizard defensive utility and desert wash, not generic military, dinosaur, dragon, or cactus theme.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Noto Sans JP, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, Japanese UI. Keep text short and legible.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, bar chart, line chart, donut chart, status chips, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons.
Defensive utility UI details: incident queue table, perimeter health chart, sensor status, route risk form, navigation for Watch, Routes, Sensors, Crews, Reports, and Alerts; status labels such as Stable, Watch, Shielded, Dry Run, Escalate.
Style: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system, precise 8px grid, 6px to 8px component radius, sand tan and warm neutral surfaces, rust horn accent actions, shadow-brown borders, angular spine dividers, restrained utility shadows, dense but organized dashboard UI.
Color palette: wash sand #ead7b3, scale tan #c79a63, rust horn #a94f2b, shadow umber #3a2618, horn brown #6f4328, clay line #b87948, bone cream #f7efd9, dusk sage #6f735e, ink brown #21170f.
Constraints: no generic purple/blue gradients, no neon colors, no military logos, no random brand names, no watermark, no misspelling of "Morphous Horned Lizard", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Horned Lizard dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Horned Lizard". It must feel like the same light-mode horned lizard system translated to dark mode, not a new theme, and it must remain derived from desert wash horned lizard body armor, crown horns, side fringe scales, sand tan camouflage, rust dorsal patches, and defensive utility operations.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 high-resolution board, clean professional UI design-system presentation, target 3840x2160 feel with large readable labels.
Required visible sections: Morphous Horned Lizard, Horned Lizard, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Sample Usage.
Reference use: Preserve the horned lizard defensive utility language: shadow-brown backgrounds, warm sand foreground text, rust horn active states, scale-tan surfaces, dusk sage focus rings, clay chart accents, angular spine dividers, desert wash texture. Must read as horned lizard and field operations, not generic military, dinosaur, dragon, or cyberpunk UI.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Noto Sans JP, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, Japanese UI. Keep text short and legible.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, bar chart, line chart, donut chart, status chips, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons.
Defensive utility UI details: incident queue table, perimeter health chart, sensor status, route risk form, navigation for Watch, Routes, Sensors, Crews, Reports, and Alerts; status labels such as Stable, Watch, Shielded, Dry Run, Escalate.
Visual details: deep shadow umber backgrounds, horn brown cards, warm bone text and hairline dividers, rust controls, dusk sage focus rings, sand and clay chart highlights, restrained contrast, crisp shadcn/tweakcn components, 8px grid, 6px to 8px card radius.
Color palette: night umber #21170f, horn shadow #2f1f14, rust horn #c15b32, wash sand #ead7b3, scale tan #c79a63, horn brown #6f4328, clay line #b87948, dusk sage #858a70, bone cream #f7efd9.
Constraints: no neon colors, no generic purple/blue gradients, no pure-black-only flat background, no military logos, no random brand names, no illegible tiny paragraphs, no watermark, no misspelling of "Morphous Horned Lizard".
